changes.field: Stale kernel token — DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH token not removed
changes.finding: automation_bus/state/work_package_active.json contains work_id=DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH with status=STARTED. Git log shows commit 3c22d0f 'chore(bus): DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH kernel COMPLETE status' was committed, but the SOP §5 rule is that the token file is deleted on successful kernel finish. The file still exists and still reads DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH. This is a pre-condition failure. Cursor's Stage 4 token verification at run time will read DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH and halt. The kernel start for DOMAIN-UX1B cannot be run until this is resolved. Resolution required before Stage 3: either run 'python backend/scripts/run_work_package.py finish' if the PATCH implementation is complete and committed, or investigate why the token was not removed and resolve it. Do not manually delete the token file without running the kernel finish.
changes.resolution: BLOCKER — must be resolved before Stage 3 (kernel start for DOMAIN-UX1B).

changes.field: Front matter — all 5 required SOP v1.3.1 fields valid
changes.finding: All five mandatory front matter fields present and correctly valued.
citations: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 6: change_type: CONTENT — CONFIRMED (see note)

changes.field: change_type: CONTENT applied to executable .tsx/.ts frontend files — edge case
changes.finding: SOP §4 defines CONTENT as 'SSOT updates, YAML modifications, knowledge expansion, non-executable data, docs-only'. The sprint modifies Wave1DomainCards.tsx and wave1HealthSystemCardDisplay.ts which are executable code. However, these files do not touch any Intelligence Core component. They only present already-governed DTO values with visual enhancement. DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH set direct precedent with the same classification for equivalent frontend-only presentational work. Accepted on that precedent. If implementation requires any code path that affects analytical output, emitted reasoning, or DTO structure, Cursor must STOP and escalate to at least STANDARD.
changes.resolution: Non-blocking. Accepted per DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH precedent. Cursor must escalate if scope changes.

changes.finding: All authority files in the prompt 'Read before doing anything' block confirmed present on disk.
citations: docs/planning-papers/DOMAIN_UX_health_systems_card_scaffold_sprint_plan_FINAL.md — CONFIRMED present. Sprint 2 (DOMAIN-UX1B) defined at line 217. Scope matches prompt exactly.
docs/audit-papers/DOMAIN-UX1A_PATCH_card_labels_low_evidence_notes.md — CONFIRMED present. Residual gap for DOMAIN-UX1B documented at line 88.

changes.field: Source component exists and baseline matches expected pre-sprint state (Stage 2A cross-ref)

Score reliability label block confirmed at lines 118-120. Evidence completeness label block confirmed at lines 123-125. Zero-evidence state shows 'Not enough data' from DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH (line 99). No subsystem chips present. Component reads score/reliability/evidence from DTO without recalculating (lines 75-77). Baseline is consistent with DOMAIN-UX1A-PATCH notes — sprint is not a no-op.
frontend/app/lib/wave1HealthSystemCardDisplay.ts confirmed present. Contains wave1IsZeroEvidenceState, wave1ScoreReliabilityLabel, wave1EvidenceCompletenessLine, wave1BandLabelDisplay.

changes.field: All required test and sentinel files present (Stage 2A)
changes.finding: All test files named in Required Validation Commands and Required Tests sections confirmed on disk.
citations: sentinel/packs/escaped_defects_v1.json — CONFIRMED present. No DOMAIN-UX1B classes present yet — must be added this sprint.

changes.field: Forbidden file boundary verified — no overlap with required implementation scope (Stage 2A)
changes.finding: Required implementation scope is entirely within frontend/app/components/results/, frontend/app/lib/, frontend/tests/, and sentinel/packs/. These are fully disjoint from the forbidden list. No backend DTO, scoring, pipeline, analytics, or SSOT files need to be touched.

changes.field: No subsystem work required — planning paper and prompt in agreement (Stage 2A cross-ref)
changes.finding: Planning paper §Sprint2 lines 240-244 and prompt §F both prohibit subsystem chips, groupings, and labels. These remain deferred to DOMAIN-UX1C. No DTO or backend changes are required to implement this sprint.

changes.field: STOP conditions present, actionable, and complete (Stage 2B)
changes.finding: Token missing/mismatch → STOP (line 98-102). Planning doc or PATCH notes missing → STOP (line 51). Baseline verification fails → STOP (line 115). Implementation requires any of nine escalation triggers → escalate HIGH + STOP (lines 18-29). All STOP conditions are unambiguous.
All preflight, validation, and closure commands use Python, npm, git, and Test-Path — no bash-only syntax.

changes.field: Premium score visual must not show for zero-evidence cards
changes.finding: Prompt §A explicitly states: 'For zero-evidence cards, do not show a score visual implying a true 0/100 health score.' The zero-evidence gate is already in the component (lines 74, 96-104 of Wave1DomainCards.tsx). Cursor must ensure any premium score visual (radial arc, gauge) is rendered only inside the non-zero-evidence branch. The zero-evidence branch must continue to show only the 'Not enough data' state without a score device.
changes.resolution: Non-blocking. Implementation constraint. Required test 'zero-evidence cards do not render the score visual as a true health score' covers this.

changes.field: Score value for premium visual must come from DTO — not recalculated
changes.finding: Current scorePct at line 75 of Wave1DomainCards.tsx correctly reads from d.score. The premium visual must use this same value. No frontend score calculation is permitted.
changes.resolution: Non-blocking. Required tests include 'score value still comes from DTO'.

changes.field: Sentinel classes must each reference an active deterministic test — no placeholders
changes.finding: Four Sentinel defect classes are required. Each must reference a test_file pointing to a real test function in this sprint. Review escaped_defects_v1.json schema (lines 1-10) before adding entries. All four classes named in the prompt must be added: health_system_card_score_visual_missing, health_system_card_zero_evidence_score_visual_visible, health_system_card_partial_evidence_overconfidence, health_system_card_frontend_invents_subsystem_chips.
